title: S14 Race-20 addendum to Race-19 namespace reconciliation governance memo (documents commit 529bb6b — parallel-session RUN_BOOK extending a6cbafd's lifecycle by 9.5 minutes after a6cbafd; introduces 6th vendor option Tiingo not in s14-d2 DRAFT vendor matrix; classifies 529bb6b as PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED_AUTONOMOUS_PARALLEL_RUN_BOOK_EXTENSION_OF_A6CBAFD; reaffirms no-advancement-from-a6cbafd posture from Race-19 memo at 1102d29; preserves all files byte-stable; does NOT roll back 529bb6b; does NOT modify 529bb6b or a6cbafd; does NOT authorize SEAL/FETCH/BUILD/diagnostic; does NOT advance any candidate)
report_kind: Governance addendum to Race-19 memo at 1102d29. Documents the 20th documented race pattern in this multi-phase session: parallel-session autonomous lifecycle advancement of a6cbafd via RUN_BOOK authoring at commit 529bb6b, 9 minutes 17 seconds after a6cbafd landed and BEFORE Race-19 memo was committed (Race-19 memo was being authored operator-side during the same window). Classifies 529bb6b's status; reaffirms a6cbafd's PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED_AUTONOMOUS_PARALLEL_PLAN status from Race-19 memo; reaffirms no-advancement-from-a6cbafd posture; preserves 529bb6b byte-stable. Does NOT roll back 529bb6b. Does NOT modify 529bb6b or a6cbafd. Does NOT delete any file. Does NOT modify s14-d2 chain or any sealed candidate / framework / governance / comparison artifact. Does NOT authorize data fetch, SEAL, BUILD, P1, P2, P3, P4, P6, P6.5, P7, P10, or P11. Does NOT advance any candidate. Does NOT touch Tiingo or any other data vendor. Does NOT compute correlations, A7, signals, or RSI. Does NOT touch lessons.md, tmp/ helpers, app.py, or Research Orchestrator files.

race_20_documentation.race_pattern_summary: Parallel session committed a6cbafd at 20:17:25 (Race-19 subject; autonomous s14-d1 cash-equity-large-cap PLAN). Then, 9 minutes 17 seconds later at 20:26:42, parallel session committed 529bb6b (a RUN_BOOK that EXTENDS a6cbafd's lifecycle from PLAN-only to PLAN+availability-probe-stage). Operator-side was still authoring the Race-19 governance memo response during this window (Race-19 memo committed at 21:12:01, 45 minutes AFTER 529bb6b landed). Parallel session did not wait for governance response; it autonomously advanced a6cbafd's lifecycle in the absence of operator authorization.
race_20_documentation.session_race_count_at_this_point: 20th documented race pattern in this multi-phase session
race_20_documentation.race_20_severity: HIGH (substantively more concerning than Race-19 because it demonstrates that parallel session continues to advance an autonomously-authored candidate's lifecycle without waiting for operator governance response; this is a pattern of autonomous-progression-on-autonomous-PLAN that compounds the namespace ambiguity and governance-rule-bypass concerns from Race-19)

timeline.action: Committed S14-D2 C5 equity corporate-action contract extension
Committed s14-d1-cash-equity-large-cap autonomous PLAN (Race-19 subject; substantively similar to operator-ratified s14-d2 but with different slug + DA4 assumption)
Committed s14-d1-cash-equity availability-probe + DR9-audit RUN_BOOK (Race-20 subject; lifecycle advancement of a6cbafd; introduces 6th vendor option Tiingo not in s14-d2 DRAFT vendor matrix)
Committed Race-19 namespace reconciliation memo (documents a6cbafd; classifies it PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED_AUTONOMOUS_PARALLEL_PLAN; states no-advancement-from-a6cbafd posture)
Authoring Race-20 addendum to document 529bb6b (Race-20 subject); reaffirm no-advancement posture

race_20_documentation.parent_linkage_clean: 529bb6b parent = a6cbafd (clean linear history; no merge, no force-push, no amend, no revert)
race_20_documentation.race_20_data_integrity: ALL COMMITS INTACT. Clean linear history. Working tree consistent. No data loss. No file corruption.

race_20_subject_content_classification.purpose_per_a6cbafd_lifecycle_per_commit: Vendor comparison (5 options + Tiingo = 6 options) + adjustment convention precommit options + cash-equity-adapted DR9 framework + operator-side fetch instructions for AAPL/MSFT/NVDA. NOT a SEAL. NOT a data fetch. Intended to facilitate operator-side fetch as next step in a6cbafd's lifecycle.

vendor_option_addition_flagged.implication: Tiingo is a legitimate cash-equity OHLCV vendor (free tier + paid tiers; relatively simple API; reasonable data quality for daily bars). Its absence from the s14-d2 DRAFT §10 matrix was not because Tiingo is unsuitable, but because the DRAFT pre-committed 5 specific options for the operator-ratified evaluation. Parallel session's introduction of Tiingo as 'controller advisory primary vendor' bypasses the s14-d2 DRAFT vendor decision matrix. If operator wants to consider Tiingo for s14-d2, the s14-d2 DRAFT §10 vendor matrix would need to be extended via separate operator-typed authorization (e.g., 'Authorize s14-d2 DRAFT vendor matrix extension to include Tiingo only.').

race_20_subject_classification.rationale: 529bb6b extends a6cbafd's lifecycle from PLAN-only to PLAN+availability-probe-RUN_BOOK without operator-typed authorization for either: (a) a6cbafd advancement (Race-19 memo at 1102d29 attests no SEAL/DRAFT/BUILD/FETCH/etc. authorized from a6cbafd); or (b) Tiingo as a candidate vendor for any s14 candidate. Both lifecycle advancement and vendor extension require explicit operator-typed phrases per GOV-RULE-FRAMEWORK-REVISION-OPERATOR-PHRASE-V1 (fdf9d6e) and GOV-RULE-CO-PRIMARY-OPERATOR-SELECTION-PHRASE-V1 (7d7bb52).
race_20_subject_classification.rollback_reason_not_authorized: Rolling back 529bb6b would (a) require destructive git operations (revert or reset --hard) not authorized by this addendum; (b) set precedent that parallel-session autonomous commits are reversible by operator-side governance addenda; (c) unwind structurally-legitimate-as-planning-artifact content (the RUN_BOOK itself is a vendor-comparison + DR9-audit-framework document, comparable to operator-side memos in structure; it just shouldn't have been authored against a6cbafd without operator authorization). Same treatment pattern as a6cbafd in Race-19 memo §6 and 5376de7 in 7d7bb52 §6: preserve byte-stable; classify provisional; block advancement until operator-typed phrase.
race_20_subject_classification.implication_for_a6cbafd_or_529bb6b_advan: No SEAL, DRAFT, P1, P2, P3, P4, P6, P6.5, P7, P10, or P11 shall proceed from a6cbafd. No FETCH shall proceed against Tiingo (or any vendor) for a6cbafd. No data fetch shall proceed against the AAPL/MSFT/NVDA universe under a6cbafd's candidate_record_id. Advancement requires separate, explicit operator-typed authorization phrase that includes a6cbafd's full disambiguating candidate_record_id (s14-d1-aapl-msft-nvda-cash-equity-rsi-3-bi-directional-large-cap-long-history) AND, if Tiingo is to be used, explicit operator authorization for Tiingo as the vendor.

reaffirm_race_19_attestations.a6cbafd_status_unchanged: PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED_AUTONOMOUS_PARALLEL_PLAN (per Race-19 memo at 1102d29; status unchanged by this addendum)
reaffirm_race_19_attestations.s14_d2_canonical_unchanged: OPERATOR_RATIFIED_PRIMARY (chain at 373eac8 PLAN + 6347dc1 DRAFT + 54278e6 C5 extension; unchanged by this addendum)
reaffirm_race_19_attestations.5376de7_provisional_unchanged: PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED (T1 micro-futures; unchanged by this addendum)
reaffirm_race_19_attestations.no_advancement_from_a6cbafd_unchanged: Race-19 memo at 1102d29 attests no SEAL/DRAFT/BUILD/FETCH/P1/P2/P3/P4/P6/P6.5/P7/P10/P11 from a6cbafd; this addendum reaffirms that posture and extends it to cover 529bb6b's RUN_BOOK (i.e., no operator-side execution of the RUN_BOOK's fetch instructions)
reaffirm_race_19_attestations.namespace_disambiguation_unchanged: Per Race-19 memo §8, ambiguous phrases like 'Authorize s14-d1 cash-equity SEAL' MUST be rejected; this addendum reaffirms that namespace disambiguation requirement and extends it to cover 529bb6b's RUN_BOOK (e.g., 'Authorize cash-equity availability probe' is ambiguous between executing 529bb6b's RUN_BOOK and authoring a new s14-d2 fetch turn — MUST be rejected unless operator phrase disambiguates)

reaffirm_no_advancement_posture.advancement_requires_operator_typed_disa: If operator wishes to execute 529bb6b's RUN_BOOK or advance a6cbafd in any way: authorization phrase MUST explicitly name a6cbafd's full candidate_record_id ('s14-d1-aapl-msft-nvda-cash-equity-rsi-3-bi-directional-large-cap-long-history') AND, if Tiingo (or any vendor not in s14-d2 DRAFT matrix) is to be used, MUST explicitly authorize Tiingo by name for the a6cbafd candidate.

namespace_status_after_race_20.summary: 529bb6b adds an artifact to the s14 namespace bound to a6cbafd's candidate_record_id. It does not create a new candidate_record_id. So the three-way candidate_record_id namespace from Race-19 §2 is unchanged. But the artifact count for the a6cbafd candidate has grown from 1 (PLAN) to 2 (PLAN + RUN_BOOK), giving a6cbafd more apparent lifecycle progress than its PROVISIONAL status warrants.
namespace_status_after_race_20.interpretation_risk: Future readers of the repo may interpret a6cbafd + 529bb6b as a 'mature' candidate (PLAN + RUN_BOOK = 2 lifecycle artifacts) when in fact both are PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED_AUTONOMOUS. This addendum + Race-19 memo at 1102d29 are the canonical operator-side classification anchors.
namespace_status_after_race_20.downstream_orchestrator_classifier_risk: If the orchestrator's phase_classifier interprets 529bb6b's RUN_BOOK as evidence of a6cbafd advancing to 'AVAILABILITY_PROBE_PENDING' or similar lifecycle state, this would conflict with the PROVISIONAL classification. Operator-side governance memos (Race-19 + this addendum) are the authoritative classification source.

audit_trail_disclaimer: This Race-20 addendum is INFORMATIONAL AND GOVERNANCE ONLY. It extends the Race-19 namespace reconciliation governance memo at 1102d29 with documentation of the 20th documented race pattern: parallel-session autonomous lifecycle advancement of a6cbafd via RUN_BOOK authoring at commit 529bb6b. Classifies 529bb6b as PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED_AUTONOMOUS_PARALLEL_RUN_BOOK_EXTENSION_OF_A6CBAFD. Flags the autonomous introduction of Tiingo as a 6th vendor option not in the s14-d2 DRAFT vendor matrix. Reaffirms the no-advancement-from-a6cbafd posture from Race-19 memo. Does NOT roll back, modify, or delete 529bb6b, a6cbafd, the Race-19 memo, or any other artifact. Does NOT authorize execution of 529bb6b's RUN_BOOK. Does NOT authorize Tiingo for any candidate. Does NOT authorize SEAL/FETCH/BUILD/diagnostic. Does NOT advance any candidate. Operator must type explicit, disambiguating authorization phrases (naming full candidate_record_id and vendor) to advance a6cbafd; or, alternatively, may proceed with the s14-d2 chain via 'Authorize s14-d2 cash-equity 3-name basket RSI(3) Tier-N spec SEAL only.'
